changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Add a Quality filter for refinding tracks manually excluded from highlights or broader statistics.

column.name: description
column.value: Find tracks manually excluded from highlights or broader statistics.

insert.column: SELECT id, CASE WHEN statistics_exclusion_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 'Statistics: ' || CASE statistics_exclusion_reason WHEN 'GPS_NOISE' THEN 'GPS noise' WHEN 'WRONG_ACTIVITY' THEN 'Wrong activity' WHEN 'IMPORT_ARTIFACT' THEN 'Import artifact' ELSE 'Other' END WHEN highlight_exclusion_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 'Highlights: ' || CASE highlight_exclusion_reason WHEN 'GPS_NOISE' THEN 'GPS noise' WHEN 'WRONG_ACTIVITY' THEN 'Wrong activity' WHEN 'IMPORT_ARTIFACT' THEN 'Import artifact' ELSE 'Other' END END AS grp FROM gps_track WHERE highlight_exclusion_reason IS NOT NULL OR statistics_exclusion_reason IS NOT NULL ORDER BY start_date DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
